customer.title: Menu
customer.scanPrompt: Scan QR code to start ordering
customer.invalidQR: Invalid QR code. Please scan a valid QR code to start ordering.
customer.goToCheckout: Please proceed to the counter to pay
customer.memberWalletPhoneStepHint: Enter the Irish mobile number on your membership, then enter your payment PIN.
customer.memberWalletPhoneOk: Verified. Enter your payment PIN to debit your stored balance.
customer.memberWalletLookupFailed: No active member found for this number.
customer.memberWalletPayFailed: Payment failed. Check your PIN or balance.
customer.paymentNotAvailable:
Apple Pay / Google Pay not available on this device.
Please pay at the counter.
customer.payAtCounterSuggestion: If online payment doesn’t work, please pay at the counter.
customer.paymentBootTimeout: Stripe.js took too long to load — check network/ad blockers, refresh, or pay at the counter.
customer.stripeJsLoadFailed: Could not initialize Stripe in this browser (invalid publishable key or script blocked).
customer.paymentNetworkError: Network error — online payment couldn’t load.
customer.stripeNotConfigured: Online payment isn’t available (Stripe not ready).
customer.paymentConfirmFailed: We couldn’t confirm your payment. Please pay at the counter.
customer.orderNotModifiable: Order is checked out and cannot be modified
customer.storeClosedDate: Today is configured as a closed date. QR ordering is unavailable.
customer.storeOutsideHours: You are outside business hours. Please access the menu during opening time.
customer.deliveryPolicyUnpaidNoKitchen: We do not prepare or deliver unpaid orders. Please complete online payment so we can cook and deliver your meal.
customer.deliveryPolicyCashCallUs: To pay with cash or to order by phone, please call the restaurant:
customer.deliveryNoPhoneConfigured: No phone number is on file for this store. Please contact the merchant another way.
customer.deliveryEircodePlaceholder: Irish Eircode (7 characters, e.g. D02 XY43)
customer.deliveryStraightLineKm: Straight-line distance from store: {{km}} km (great circle, not driving route)
customer.storePortalChooseTitle: How would you like to order?
customer.storePortalPickupHint: Prepare ahead — pick up at the restaurant.
customer.storePortalOfferHint: Add the matching items in the menu to get this price.

cashier.title: Cashier
cashier.memberCheckoutHint: Enter the member phone and tap Load to see name and balance. Confirm the name with the guest before paying. Balance must cover the total.
cashier.memberReadyToSubmit: Ready to check out with wallet
cashier.memberLookupFailed: No member found for this phone number
cashier.amountMismatch: Cash + Card amount must equal total
cashier.mixedMismatch: Cash + card must equal amount still due
cashier.deliveryFeeRulesNeedDistance: Distance-based fees are enabled. Enter a valid postcode and wait for distance before placing the order.
cashier.deliveryPhonePlaceholder: Phone (10 digits, or blur/Enter to load member)
cashier.deliveryEircodePlaceholder: Irish Eircode (7 chars, e.g. D02 XY43)
cashier.emptyOrderHint: Tap items on the left to add
cashier.phoneOrderPayLater: Collect payment on the Phone queue when the guest picks up.
cashier.deliveryNotEnabledPlan: Delivery is not enabled on this plan.
cashier.errDeliveryNeedFields: Delivery orders need name, phone, postcode, and address.
cashier.frequentItemsHint: Based on past orders; for reference only.

member.title: Member
member.deliveryHint: Enter a full Irish Eircode: we try to fill the address automatically (maps may be incomplete). You can always edit the line below. Requires delivery feature and Google geo on the store.
member.changePinInProfileHint: Used to sign in and verify at the store. Remember your new PIN after changing.
member.txnDetailLinesEmpty: No line items (see note above if any).

txnNote.retryRefundCredit: Manual top-up: refund credit to wallet (retry)
txnNote.reversalAfterTableFail: Checkout update failed — wallet credit restored
txnNote.reversalAfterSeatFail: Order update failed — wallet credit restored

member.topUpCardHint: Enter the 6-character code and 6-digit PIN from the card. The face value is credited once (the card must be activated by the store).
member.topUpCollapsedHint: Stripe top-up, €{{min}}–€{{max}}. Tap the title to expand.
member.topUpHint: Uses this store’s Stripe keys from Admin (same publishable/secret pair as menu checkout). Amount €{{min}}–€{{max}}.
member.txnLoadNetworkError: Could not load activity. Check your connection and try again.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.excludedItemsHelp: Exclusions apply to all match paths: if an item is excluded, this rule's template will not apply to it.
admin.ruleTargetsHelp: Pick at least one target: multiple categories, multiple items, or both.
admin.membersHint: Search by phone, member #, or name. Self-service: /store/customer/member
admin.memberRechargePick: Choose a member from the list
admin.memberLedgerRowHint: Click a member row to view wallet transactions. The Top up button only opens manual top-up.
admin.topupCardsGenCollapsedHint: Tap the title to expand: generate inactive cards by batch, optionally download Excel with PINs.
admin.topupCardsActivateCollapsedHint: Tap the title to expand: enter card codes and a face value to activate in bulk.
admin.topupCardsActiveMemberHint: This card has a face value and is waiting for a member to redeem it. After redemption, their phone and name appear here.
admin.topupCardsRedeemMemberMissing: Redeemer member ID is set, but no member profile was found for this store (it may have been removed).
admin.topupCardsActivateCodesHint: Separate codes with commas, spaces, or newlines. Only inactive cards get this face value and become active.
admin.topupCardsActivateCodesPlaceholder: e.g. AB12CD EF34GH or one per line
admin.topupCardsGenOk: Generated {{n}} cards. Store PINs safely (shown once).
admin.topupCardsActivateByCodesOk: {{modified}} of {{requested}} code(s) activated (others may be missing, already active, or invalid)
admin.topupCardsLastGenTitle: This batch (copy now — PINs only shown here)
admin.topupCardsCopyTableHint: Select the table to copy, or use the button to paste into Excel.
admin.topupCardsCopyFailed: Copy failed — select the table or text area manually
admin.reportMemberWalletDetail: Orders paid fully from stored balance (included in net revenue).
admin.reportMemberCreditMixed: Wallet amount used inside cash/card/mixed checkouts
admin.stripeSettingsHelp: Publishable and secret keys are stored only in the database; payments read only these values—environment variables are not used. Both keys must be saved before customers can pay online. Refresh the customer page after saving so the new publishable key loads.
admin.stripeSecretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret; enter a new value to replace
admin.stripeSecretHint: The secret is never shown again. Leave blank on save to keep the existing key.
admin.stripeClearSecretConfirm: Remove the saved Stripe secret key from the database? You must enter and save a new secret before taking payments again (environment variables are not used).
admin.stripeHealthIntro: Validates key formats, test vs live alignment, and a read-only Stripe balance call — no orders or charges.
admin.stripeHealthOk: All checks passed: keys look valid, modes match, and the secret key reached Stripe (read-only balance check).
admin.stripeHealthFail: Some checks failed — fix the items below.
admin.stripeHealthCheckSecret: Secret saved with valid format (sk_test_ / sk_live_)
admin.stripeHealthCheckMode: Publishable and secret are both test or both live
admin.stripeHealthCheckApi: Secret key can call Stripe API
admin.deliveryFeeIntro: Charge by straight-line kilometres from the store. Cashier delivery mode uses the guest Eircode to compute distance. QR self-orders without distance are charged €0 delivery until a quote exists. Use “Rest of distances” only on the last tier for everything beyond the previous cap.
admin.deliveryFeeColumnsHint: Each row is: if distance ≤ cap (km), charge this fee (€). Caps must increase down the list; only the last row may be “rest of distances”.
admin.deliveryFeeEmpty: No rules — saving an empty list means no distance-based delivery fee.
admin.deliveryFeeInvalid: Invalid rules: caps must be positive and strictly increasing; only the last tier may be “remaining”; fees must be ≥ 0.
admin.deliveryFeeLastRowHint: Example: within 3 km €3, within 5 km €5, then €8 beyond: rows 3€@3km, 5€@5km, then check “remaining” and enter €8.
admin.receiptTermsHelp: Use [QR:URL] to insert a QR code on the receipt
admin.allergenInUse: This allergen is in use by menu items and cannot be deleted

portal.hero: Less friction at the table. Leaner service on the floor.
portal.lead: Let guests order and pay from their phones, line up phone and walk-in orders on the same rail, and keep one live menu that nudges add-ons—so you save labor, speed up turns, and grow average check without a bigger headcount.
portal.lead2: From dine-in QR and takeaway QR to a single payment and pickup flow: fewer order mistakes, less running between tables and the till, and clearer visibility into what is selling today.
portal.modulesTitle: Where guests meet your menu—and where you save time
portal.modulesSubtitle: Designed around busy shifts: faster ordering for diners, fewer repetitive tasks for staff, and menus that help lift ticket size.
portal.footer: L&Z Techserve Limited · F&B · End-to-end F&B digitization

dineIn.title: QR dine-in ordering
dineIn.desc: Guests scan once at the table, browse photos and modifiers at their own pace, and send orders straight to the kitchen—no waiting to flag someone down during peak hours. Fewer missed upsells from rushed verbal orders.

takeaway.title: Takeaway & pickup QR
takeaway.desc: Same smooth flow for guests ordering ahead: scan from a poster or window code, choose pickup time, pay online, and pick up when ready—front-of-house spends less time retaking details on the phone.

counter.title: Phone orders & counter in one flow
counter.desc: Walk-in, phone, and counter orders follow one ticket line with clear statuses—print or bump to the line, take integrated payment once, and reduce double entry between the handset and the POS.

menu.title: Digital menu that lifts revenue
menu.desc: Replace printed sheets that go out of date: highlight combos, sides, and drinks where guests already look, surface allergens clearly, and rotate offers by daypart—many venues see higher attachment and average spend when choices are visible and easy to add.

chainSplit.title: Consistent experience across locations
chainSplit.body: When you run more than one site, guests get the same simple scan-and-order habit everywhere; you roll out menu or price adjustments from one place instead of chasing paper at each branch.
chainSplit.b1: Branding and items stay aligned per venue while guests always recognize the same ordering steps.
chainSplit.b2: Promotions and seasonal sets can go live together—less confusion for staff training across stores.
chainSplit.b3: Less time reprinting menus and reconciling mismatched versions between the floor and the kitchen.

flowSplit.title: One journey: choose, pay, collect
flowSplit.body: Whether someone is at the table or picking up, they see what they ordered, pay in one place, and know when to collect—customers wait less at the counter and staff answer fewer “where is my order?” questions.
flowSplit.b1: Kitchen and service see the same queue so handoff stays calm during rushes.
flowSplit.b2: Integrated payment means fewer cash-handling steps and fewer wrong totals from manual re-keying.

opsSplit.title: Day-to-day control without spreadsheet chaos
opsSplit.body: Owner-managers update dishes, prices, and tags in one console; staff see today’s truth on phones and printers—less back-and-forth and fewer disputes over outdated chalkboards or PDF menus.
opsSplit.b1: Shift-friendly screens so the team spends minutes—not hours—on order exceptions.
opsSplit.b2: Clear sales views help you trim slow movers and double down on what actually drives margin.
